title: SimpleMctiers
description: Shows A Players McTiers Rank Includes PAPI Support
body:
**PAPI PlaceHolders**

%tier_crystal%
%tier_smp%
%tier_uhc%
%tier_sword%
%tier_axe%
%tier_nethpot%
%tier_pot%
%tier_mace%

**Discription** 

This Plugin Is Made To Show Players Ranking In The Popular Tierlist McTiers By Either Using /tier <player> Or Using Our PAPI Placeholder That We Provided Above This Plugin Support 1.21.* And I Will Update Everytime A New Paper Version Releases Within A Few Days
**THIS PLUGIN IS NOT ASSOCIATED WITH MCTIERS THIS IS JUST MADE BY VADLOX**
